analyzer_fixtures.label: analyzer_simple_health_claim
analyzer_fixtures.message: Does taking vitamin C prevent the common cold?

analyzer_fixtures.label: analyzer_compound_health_claim
analyzer_fixtures.message: Does folic acid prevent birth defects, and does vitamin D treat depression?

judge_fixtures.label: judge_supported
judge_fixtures.claim: WHO suggests surgical or radiological treatment for males with infertility undergoing treatment of varicocele

evidence.text: WHO suggests surgical or radiological treatment for males with infertility undergoing treatment of varicocele

judge_fixtures.label: judge_contradicted
judge_fixtures.claim: Vasectomy makes you completely sterile within 24 hours

evidence.text: After vasectomy, it can take up to 3 months and roughly 20 ejaculations to achieve sterility; a follow-up semen analysis is recommended to confirm azoospermia before relying on it as sole contraception.

judge_fixtures.label: judge_emergency_severity
judge_fixtures.claim: Chest pain and shortness of breath during pregnancy can be safely ignored

evidence.text: Sudden chest pain, shortness of breath, or a severe headache during pregnancy are warning signs of a medical emergency (e.g. pulmonary embolism or preeclampsia) and require immediate medical attention.
